title: Huetia cynapioides
taxonomy: Huetia cynapioides is classified within the family Apiaceae. This plant is a member of the order Apiales, which comprises plants with similar characteristics. Huetia cynapioides is further grouped under the family Apiaceae, also known as the carrot or parsley family. It is believed to be native to the tropical regions of New Caledonia, an island country in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of Huetia cynapioides reflects its botanical characteristics, including its leaf and flower structures.
